message:
🐛 fix: StatefulSet health check now verifies updatedReplicas and revision (#10006) (#10011)

The health check for StatefulSets only compared readyReplicas to replicas,
causing the UI to report "Healthy" during rolling updates when old pods were
still ready. Now also checks updatedReplicas == replicas and
currentRevision == updateRevision, consistent with the Deployment health
check. Backwards-compatible: older API servers that don't populate these
fields still report healthy when all pods are ready.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
